...  569 
...  570     async fn execute_recursive_planner_loop(
...  571         &self,
...  572         prompt: &str,
...  573         context: PlannerLoopContext,
...  574         event_sink: Arc<dyn TurnEventSink>,
...  575     ) -> Result<Option<EvidenceBundle>> {
...  576         let budget = PlannerBudget::default();
...  577         let mut loop_state = PlannerLoopState::default();
...  578         let mut used_workspace_resources = false;
...  579         let mut stop_reason = None;
...  580         let gatherer_provider = context
...  581             .prepared
...  582             .gatherer
...  583             .as_ref()
...  584             .map(|lane| lane.label.clone())
...  585             .unwrap_or_else(|| "workspace".to_string());
...  586 
...  587         for sequence in 1..=budget.max_steps {
...  588             let request = PlannerRequest::new(
...  589                 prompt,
...  590                 self.workspace_root.clone(),
...  591                 context.interpretation.clone(),
...  592                 budget.clone(),
...  593             )
...  594             .with_recent_turns(context.recent_turns.clone())
...  595             .with_loop_state(loop_state.clone());
...  596             let decision = context.planner_engine.select_next_action(&request).await?;
...  597             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerActionSelected {
...  598                 sequence,
...  599                 action: decision.action.summary(),
...  600                 rationale: decision.rationale.clone(),
...  601             });
...  602 
...  603             let outcome = match &decision.action {
...  604                 PlannerAction::Search { query, intent } => {
...  605                     if let Some(gatherer) = context.gatherer.as_ref() {
...  606                         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererCapability {
...  607                             provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
...  608                             capability: format_gatherer_capability(&gatherer.capability()),
...  609                         });
...  610                         match gatherer.capability() {
...  611                             GathererCapability::Available => {
...  612                                 let request = ContextGatherRequest::new(
...  613                                     query.clone(),
...  614                                     self.workspace_root.clone(),
...  615                                     intent
...  616                                         .clone()
...  617                                         .unwrap_or_else(|| "planner-search".to_string()),
...  618                                     EvidenceBudget::default(),
...  619                                 )
...  620                                 .with_planning(PlannerConfig::default().with_step_limit(1))
...  621                                 .with_prior_context(
...  622                                     build_planner_prior_context(
...  623                                         &context.interpretation,
...  624                                         &context.recent_turns,
...  625                                         &loop_state,
...  626                                     ),
...  627                                 );
...  628                                 match gatherer.gather_context(&request).await {
...  629                                     Ok(result) => {
...  630                                         let bundle = result.evidence_bundle;
...  631                                         if let Some(bundle) = bundle.as_ref() {
...  632                                             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererSummary {
...  633                                                 provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
...  634                                                 summary: bundle.summary.clone(),
...  635                                                 sources: evidence_sources(
...  636                                                     &self.workspace_root,
...  637                                                     bundle,
...  638                                                 ),
...  639                                             });
...  640                                             if let Some(planner) = bundle.planner.as_ref() {
...  641                                                 event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerSummary {
...  642                                                     strategy: format_planner_strategy(
...  643                                                         &planner.strategy,
...  644                                                     )
...  645                                                     .to_string(),
...  646                                                     turns: planner.turn_count,
...  647                                                     steps: planner.steps.len(),
...  648                                                     stop_reason: planner.stop_reason.clone(),
...  649                                                 });
...  650                                             }
...  651                                             merge_evidence_items(
...  652                                                 &mut loop_state.evidence_items,
...  653                                                 bundle.items.clone(),
...  654                                                 budget.max_evidence_items,
...  655                                             );
...  656                                             loop_state.notes.extend(bundle.warnings.clone());
...  657                                             used_workspace_resources = true;
...  658                                             bundle.summary.clone()
...  659                                         } else {
...  660                                             "planner search returned no evidence bundle".to_string()
...  661                                         }
...  662                                     }
...  663                                     Err(err) => format!("planner search failed: {err:#}"),
...  664                                 }
...  665                             }
...  666                             GathererCapability::Unsupported { reason }
...  667                             | GathererCapability::HarnessRequired { reason } => {
...  668                                 format!("planner search backend unavailable: {reason}")
...  669                             }
...  670                         }
...  671                     } else {
...  672                         "no gatherer backend is configured for planner search".to_string()
...  673                     }
...  674                 }
...  675                 PlannerAction::Read { path } => {
...  676                     if read_steps(&loop_state) >= budget.max_reads {
...  677                         stop_reason = Some("read-budget-exhausted".to_string());
...  678                         "planner read budget exhausted".to_string()
...  679                     } else {
...  680                         let (source, snippet) = read_planner_file(&self.workspace_root, path)?;
...  681                         append_evidence_item(
...  682                             &mut loop_state.evidence_items,
...  683                             EvidenceItem {
...  684                                 source: source.clone(),
...  685                                 snippet,
...  686                                 rationale: decision.rationale.clone(),
...  687                                 rank: 0,
...  688                             },
...  689                             budget.max_evidence_items,
...  690                         );
...  691                         used_workspace_resources = true;
...  692                         format!("read {source}")
...  693                     }
...  694                 }
...  695                 PlannerAction::Inspect { command } => {
...  696                     if inspect_steps(&loop_state) >= budget.max_inspects {
...  697                         stop_reason = Some("inspect-budget-exhausted".to_string());
...  698                         "planner inspect budget exhausted".to_string()
...  699                     } else {
...  700                         let output = run_planner_inspect_command(&self.workspace_root, command)?;
...  701                         append_evidence_item(
...  702                             &mut loop_state.evidence_items,
...  703                             EvidenceItem {
...  704                                 source: format!("command: {command}"),
...  705                                 snippet: trim_for_planner(&output, 800),
...  706                                 rationale: decision.rationale.clone(),
...  707                                 rank: 0,
...  708                             },
...  709                             budget.max_evidence_items,
...  710                         );
...  711                         used_workspace_resources = true;
...  712                         format!("inspected {command}")
...  713                     }
...  714                 }
...  715                 PlannerAction::Refine { query, .. } => {
...  716                     if let Some(gatherer) = context.gatherer.as_ref() {
...  717                         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererCapability {
...  718                             provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
...  719                             capability: format_gatherer_capability(&gatherer.capability()),
...  720                         });
...  721                         match gatherer.capability() {
...  722                             GathererCapability::Available => {
...  723                                 let request = ContextGatherRequest::new(
...  724                                     query.clone(),
...  725                                     self.workspace_root.clone(),
...  726                                     "planner-refine",
...  727                                     EvidenceBudget::default(),
...  728                                 )
...  729                                 .with_planning(PlannerConfig::default().with_step_limit(1))
...  730                                 .with_prior_context(
...  731                                     build_planner_prior_context(
...  732                                         &context.interpretation,
...  733                                         &context.recent_turns,
...  734                                         &loop_state,
...  735                                     ),
...  736                                 );
...  737                                 match gatherer.gather_context(&request).await {
...  738                                     Ok(result) => {
...  739                                         let bundle = result.evidence_bundle;
...  740                                         if let Some(bundle) = bundle.as_ref() {
...  741                                             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererSummary {
...  742                                                 provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
...  743                                                 summary: bundle.summary.clone(),
...  744                                                 sources: evidence_sources(
...  745                                                     &self.workspace_root,
...  746                                                     bundle,
...  747                                                 ),
...  748                                             });
...  749                                             merge_evidence_items(
...  750                                                 &mut loop_state.evidence_items,
...  751                                                 bundle.items.clone(),
...  752                                                 budget.max_evidence_items,
...  753                                             );
...  754                                             loop_state.notes.extend(bundle.warnings.clone());
...  755                                             used_workspace_resources = true;
...  756                                             format!("refined search toward `{query}`")
...  757                                         } else {
...  758                                             "planner refine returned no evidence bundle".to_string()
...  759                                         }
...  760                                     }
...  761                                     Err(err) => format!("planner refine failed: {err:#}"),
...  762                                 }
...  763                             }
...  764                             GathererCapability::Unsupported { reason }
...  765                             | GathererCapability::HarnessRequired { reason } => {
...  766                                 format!("planner refine backend unavailable: {reason}")
...  767                             }
...  768                         }
...  769                     } else {
...  770                         "no gatherer backend is configured for refined planner search".to_string()
...  771                     }
...  772                 }
...  773                 PlannerAction::Branch { branches, .. } => {
...  774                     for branch in branches.iter().take(budget.max_branch_factor) {
...  775                         if !loop_state.pending_branches.contains(branch) {
...  776                             loop_state.pending_branches.push(branch.clone());
...  777                         }
...  778                     }
...  779                     format!(
...  780                         "queued {} planner branch(es)",
...  781                         branches.len().min(budget.max_branch_factor)
...  782                     )
...  783                 }
...  784                 PlannerAction::Stop { reason } => {
...  785                     stop_reason = Some(reason.clone());
...  786                     format!("planner requested synthesis: {reason}")
...  787                 }
...  788             };
...  789 
...  790             loop_state.steps.push(PlannerStepRecord {
...  791                 sequence,
...  792                 action: decision.action.clone(),
...  793                 outcome: outcome.clone(),
...  794             });
...  795 
...  796             if let PlannerAction::Stop { .. } = decision.action {
...  797                 break;
...  798             }
...  799 
...  800             if stop_reason.is_some() {
...  801                 break;
...  802             }
...  803         }
...  804 
...  805         let completed = stop_reason.is_some();
...  806         let stop_reason = stop_reason.unwrap_or_else(|| "planner-budget-exhausted".to_string());
...  807         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerSummary {
...  808             strategy: "model-driven".to_string(),
...  809             turns: loop_state.steps.len(),
...  810             steps: loop_state.steps.len(),
...  811             stop_reason: Some(stop_reason.clone()),
...  812         });
...  813 
...  814         if !used_workspace_resources && planner_stopped_without_resource_use(&loop_state) {
...  815             return Ok(None);
...  816         }
...  817 
...  818         Ok(Some(build_planner_evidence_bundle(
...  819             &context.prepared,
...  820             prompt,
...  821             &loop_state,
...  822             completed,
...  823             &stop_reason,
...  824         )))
...  825     }
528  826 }

... 177 fn interpretation_kind_score(kind: MemoryDocumentKind) -> usize {
... 178     match kind {

... 180         MemoryDocumentKind::LinkedGuidance => 0,

... 184 fn load_memory_document(
... 185     path: PathBuf,
... 186     kind: MemoryDocumentKind,
... 187 ) -> std::io::Result<Option<MemoryDocument>> {
... 188     let contents = fs::read_to_string(&path)?;
... 189     let trimmed = contents.trim();
... 190     if trimmed.is_empty() {
... 191         return Ok(None);
... 192     }
... 193 
... 194     Ok(Some(MemoryDocument {
... 195         path,
... 196         contents: trimmed.to_string(),
... 197         kind,
... 198     }))
... 199 }

... 255 fn canonical_memory_path(path: &Path) -> PathBuf {
... 256     path.canonicalize().unwrap_or_else(|_| path.to_path_buf())
... 257 }
155 258 
156 259 fn default_user_memory_path() -> Option<PathBuf> {
157 260     env::var_os("HOME").map(|home| PathBuf::from(home).join(USER_MEMORY_RELATIVE_PATH))
158 261 }
... 262 
... 263 fn discover_linked_documents(agent_path: &Path, contents: &str) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
... 264     let mut ordered = Vec::new();
... 265     let mut seen = HashSet::new();
... 266     for target in extract_markdown_link_targets(contents)
... 267         .into_iter()
... 268         .chain(extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents))
... 269     {
... 270         let Some(resolved) = resolve_link_target(agent_path, &target) else {
... 271             continue;
... 272         };
... 273         let canonical = canonical_memory_path(&resolved);
... 274         if seen.insert(canonical) {
... 275             ordered.push(resolved);
... 276         }
... 277     }
... 278     ordered
... 279 }
... 280 
... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
... 287             break;
... 288         };
... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
... 292         }
... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
... 294     }
... 295     targets
... 296 }
... 297 
... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
... 301     let mut current = String::new();
... 302 
... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
... 304         if ch == '`' {
... 305             if in_tick {
... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
... 309                 }
... 310                 current.clear();
... 311             }
... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
... 313             continue;
... 314         }
... 315 
... 316         if in_tick {
... 317             current.push(ch);
... 318         }
... 319     }
... 320 
... 321     targets
... 322 }
... 323 
... 324 fn looks_like_local_doc_target(target: &str) -> bool {
... 325     target.ends_with(".md") || target.starts_with(".keel/")
... 326 }
... 327 
... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
... 332     {
... 333         return None;
... 334     }
... 335 
... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
... 338         return None;
... 339     }
... 340 
... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
... 343     } else {
... 344         agent_path.parent()?.join(target)
... 345     };
... 346 
... 347     if candidate.is_file() {
... 348         Some(candidate)
... 349     } else {
... 350         None
... 351     }
... 352 }
159 353 
160 354 fn trim_memory_contents(contents: &str) -> String {
161 355     if contents.chars().count() <= MAX_MEMORY_FILE_CHARS {

src/infrastructure/adapters/agent_memory.rs --- 8/9 --- Rust
170 364     trimmed
171 365 }
... 366 
... 367 fn display_path(workspace_root: &Path, path: &Path) -> String {
... 368     path.strip_prefix(workspace_root)
... 369         .unwrap_or(path)
... 370         .display()
... 371         .to_string()
... 372 }
... 373 
... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
... 377 
... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
... 379     let mut score = 0;
... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
... 384                 .iter()
... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
... 386                 .count();
... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
... 388                 score += matched_terms;
... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
... 393                     break;
... 394                 }
... 395             }
... 396         }
... 397     }
... 398 
... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
... 400         excerpt.extend(
... 401             lines
... 402                 .into_iter()
... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
... 404                 .take(8),
... 405         );
... 406     }
... 407 
... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
... 409 }
... 410 
... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()
... 414         .split(|ch: char| !ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() && ch != '_' && ch != '.')
... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
... 416         .filter(|term| {
... 417             !matches!(
... 418                 *term,
... 419                 "the"
... 420                     | "and"
... 421                     | "with"
... 422                     | "from"
... 423                     | "into"
... 424                     | "that"
... 425                     | "this"
... 426                     | "what"
... 427                     | "when"
... 428                     | "where"
... 429                     | "which"
... 430                     | "would"
... 431                     | "could"
... 432                     | "should"
... 433                     | "about"
... 434                     | "your"
... 435             )
... 436         })
... 437         .map(str::to_string)
... 438         .collect::<Vec<_>>();
... 439     terms.sort();
... 440     terms.dedup();
... 441     terms
... 442 }

219 490     }

... 511         );

... 516         assert!(interpretation.sources().contains(&"README.md".to_string()));

 ...  826     pub fn select_planner_action(
 ...  827         &self,
 ...  828         request: &PlannerRequest,
 ...  829     ) -> Result<RecursivePlannerDecision> {
 ...  830         let mut conversation = self.conversation_factory.start_conversation()?;
 ...  831         let mut reply = self.send_to_model(
 ...  832             conversation.as_mut(),
 ...  833             &build_planner_action_prompt(&PlannerPrompt {
 ...  834                 workspace_root: &request.workspace_root,
 ...  835                 user_prompt: &request.user_prompt,
 ...  836                 interpretation: &request.interpretation,
 ...  837                 request,
 ...  838             }),
 ...  839         )?;
 ...  840 
 ...  841         if is_blank_model_reply(&reply) || parse_planner_action(&reply)?.is_none() {
 ...  842             self.log_retry_reason(
 ...  843                 "planner-retry",
 ...  844                 &reply,
 ...  845                 "missing or invalid planner action response",
 ...  846             );
 ...  847             reply =
 ...  848                 self.send_to_model(conversation.as_mut(), &build_planner_retry_prompt(request))?;
 ...  849         }
 ...  850 
 ...  851         if let Some(decision) = parse_planner_action(&reply)? {
 ...  852             return Ok(decision);
 ...  853         }
 ...  854 
 ...  855         self.log_retry_reason(
 ...  856             "planner-fallback",
 ...  857             &reply,
 ...  858             "falling back to bounded heuristic planner action",
 ...  859         );
 ...  860         Ok(fallback_planner_action(request))
 ...  861     }

.... 1592 fn build_planner_action_prompt(prompt: &PlannerPrompt<'_>) -> String {
.... 1593     format!(
.... 1594         "You are the recursive planner lane for Paddles.\n\
.... 1595 Choose the NEXT bounded workspace resource action for this turn.\n\
.... 1596 Reply with ONLY one JSON object and no prose or markdown.\n\
.... 1597 \n\
.... 1598 Allowed actions:\n\
.... 1599 - {{\"action\":\"search\",\"query\":\"...\",\"intent\":\"optional\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
.... 1600 - {{\"action\":\"read\",\"path\":\"relative/path\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
.... 1601 - {{\"action\":\"inspect\",\"command\":\"read-only shell command\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
.... 1602 - {{\"action\":\"refine\",\"query\":\"...\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
.... 1603 - {{\"action\":\"branch\",\"branches\":[\"...\",\"...\"],\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
.... 1604 - {{\"action\":\"stop\",\"reason\":\"...\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
.... 1605 \n\
.... 1606 Rules:\n\
.... 1607 - Search when you need workspace retrieval.\n\
.... 1608 - Read when a specific file or artifact should be opened.\n\
.... 1609 - Inspect when a read-only workspace command would clarify state.\n\
.... 1610 - Refine when an earlier search needs a sharper query.\n\
.... 1611 - Branch when the investigation should split into multiple subqueries.\n\
.... 1612 - Stop when you already have enough evidence or when the question does not require workspace resources.\n\
.... 1613 - Never answer the user directly here.\n\
.... 1614 - Inspect commands must stay read-only.\n\
.... 1615 \n\
.... 1616 Workspace root:\n\
.... 1617 {}\n\
.... 1618 \n\
.... 1619 Interpretation context:\n\
.... 1620 {}\n\
.... 1621 \n\
.... 1622 Recent turns:\n\
.... 1623 {}\n\
.... 1624 \n\
.... 1625 Current loop state:\n\
.... 1626 {}\n\
.... 1627 \n\
.... 1628 Current user request:\n\
.... 1629 {}\n",
.... 1630         prompt.workspace_root.display(),
.... 1631         format_interpretation_context_digest(prompt.interpretation),
.... 1632         format_recent_turn_list(&prompt.request.recent_turns),
.... 1633         format_planner_loop_state_digest(prompt.request),
.... 1634         prompt.user_prompt,
.... 1635     )
.... 1636 }

.... 1984 fn format_recent_turn_list(turns: &[String]) -> String {
.... 1985     if turns.is_empty() {
.... 1986         return "No recent turns were attached.".to_string();
.... 1987     }
.... 1988 
.... 1989     turns
.... 1990         .iter()
.... 1991         .map(|turn| format!("- {}", trim_for_context(turn, 240)))

.... 1995 
.... 1996 fn format_planner_loop_state_digest(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {
.... 1997     let remaining_steps = request
.... 1998         .budget
.... 1999         .max_steps
.... 2000         .saturating_sub(request.loop_state.steps.len());
.... 2001     let mut lines = vec![format!(
.... 2002         "Budget remaining: steps={}, evidence_limit={}, pending_branches={}",
.... 2003         remaining_steps,
.... 2004         request.budget.max_evidence_items,
.... 2005         request.loop_state.pending_branches.len()
.... 2006     )];
.... 2007 
.... 2008     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() {
.... 2009         lines.push("No planner steps have executed yet.".to_string());
.... 2010     } else {
.... 2011         for step in request.loop_state.steps.iter().rev().take(4).rev() {
.... 2012             lines.push(format!(
.... 2013                 "- step {}: {} -> {}",
.... 2014                 step.sequence,
.... 2015                 step.action.summary(),
.... 2016                 trim_for_context(&step.outcome, 180)
.... 2017             ));
.... 2018         }
.... 2019     }
.... 2020 
.... 2021     if !request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
.... 2022         lines.push("Current evidence:".to_string());
.... 2023         for item in request
.... 2024             .loop_state
.... 2025             .evidence_items
.... 2026             .iter()
.... 2027             .take(request.budget.max_evidence_items.min(4))
.... 2028         {
.... 2029             lines.push(format!(
.... 2030                 "- {}: {}",
.... 2031                 item.source,
.... 2032                 trim_for_context(&item.snippet, 180)
.... 2033             ));
.... 2034         }
.... 2035     }
.... 2036 
.... 2037     if !request.loop_state.notes.is_empty() {
.... 2038         lines.push("Current notes:".to_string());
.... 2039         for note in request.loop_state.notes.iter().take(3) {
.... 2040             lines.push(format!("- {}", trim_for_context(note, 180)));
.... 2041         }
.... 2042     }
.... 2043 
.... 2044     if !request.loop_state.pending_branches.is_empty() {
.... 2045         lines.push(format!(
.... 2046             "Pending branches: {}",
.... 2047             request.loop_state.pending_branches.join(" | ")
.... 2048         ));
.... 2049     }
.... 2050 
.... 2051     lines.join("\n")
.... 2052 }

.... 2281 
.... 2282 fn parse_planner_action(response: &str) -> Result<Option<RecursivePlannerDecision>> {
.... 2283     let trimmed = response.trim();
.... 2284     let Some(json) = extract_json_payload(trimmed) else {
.... 2285         return Ok(None);
.... 2286     };
.... 2287     let Ok(action) = serde_json::from_str::<PlannerActionEnvelope>(json) else {
.... 2288         return Ok(None);
.... 2289     };
.... 2290 
.... 2291     Ok(Some(planner_action_from_envelope(action)?))
.... 2292 }
.... 2293 
.... 2294 fn planner_action_from_envelope(
.... 2295     envelope: PlannerActionEnvelope,
.... 2296 ) -> Result<RecursivePlannerDecision> {
.... 2297     let decision = match envelope {
.... 2298         PlannerActionEnvelope::Search {
.... 2299             query,
.... 2300             intent,
.... 2301             rationale,
.... 2302         } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
.... 2303             action: PlannerAction::Search {
.... 2304                 query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
.... 2305                 intent: intent.and_then(|value| {
.... 2306                     let trimmed = value.trim();
.... 2307                     (!trimmed.is_empty()).then(|| trimmed.to_string())
.... 2308                 }),
.... 2309             },
.... 2310             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
.... 2311         },
.... 2312         PlannerActionEnvelope::Read { path, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
.... 2313             action: PlannerAction::Read {
.... 2314                 path: required_planner_field("path", path)?,
.... 2315             },
.... 2316             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
.... 2317         },
.... 2318         PlannerActionEnvelope::Inspect { command, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
.... 2319             action: PlannerAction::Inspect {
.... 2320                 command: required_planner_field("command", command)?,
.... 2321             },
.... 2322             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
.... 2323         },
.... 2324         PlannerActionEnvelope::Refine { query, rationale } => {
.... 2325             let rationale_text = rationale
.... 2326                 .as_deref()
.... 2327                 .map(str::trim)
.... 2328                 .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())
.... 2329                 .map(str::to_string);
.... 2330             RecursivePlannerDecision {
.... 2331                 action: PlannerAction::Refine {
.... 2332                     query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
.... 2333                     rationale: rationale_text.clone(),
.... 2334                 },
.... 2335                 rationale: rationale_text.unwrap_or_else(|| "refine the investigation".to_string()),
.... 2336             }
.... 2337         }
.... 2338         PlannerActionEnvelope::Branch {
.... 2339             branches,
.... 2340             rationale,
.... 2341         } => {
.... 2342             let branches = branches
.... 2343                 .into_iter()
.... 2344                 .map(|branch| branch.trim().to_string())
.... 2345                 .filter(|branch| !branch.is_empty())
.... 2346                 .collect::<Vec<_>>();
.... 2347             if branches.is_empty() {
.... 2348                 bail!("planner branch action must include at least one branch");
.... 2349             }
.... 2350             RecursivePlannerDecision {
.... 2351                 action: PlannerAction::Branch {
.... 2352                     branches,
.... 2353                     rationale: rationale.clone(),
.... 2354                 },
.... 2355                 rationale: rationale.unwrap_or_else(|| "branch the investigation".to_string()),
.... 2356             }
.... 2357         }
.... 2358         PlannerActionEnvelope::Stop { reason, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
.... 2359             action: PlannerAction::Stop {
.... 2360                 reason: required_planner_field("reason", reason)?,
.... 2361             },
.... 2362             rationale: rationale.unwrap_or_else(|| "stop planning".to_string()),
.... 2363         },
.... 2364     };
.... 2365 
.... 2366     Ok(decision)
.... 2367 }
.... 2368 
.... 2369 fn required_planner_field(name: &str, value: String) -> Result<String> {
.... 2370     let trimmed = value.trim();
.... 2371     if trimmed.is_empty() {
.... 2372         bail!("planner field `{name}` must not be empty");
.... 2373     }
.... 2374     Ok(trimmed.to_string())
.... 2375 }
.... 2376 
.... 2377 fn fallback_planner_action(request: &PlannerRequest) -> RecursivePlannerDecision {
.... 2378     if let Some(branch) = request.loop_state.pending_branches.first() {
.... 2379         return RecursivePlannerDecision {
.... 2380             action: PlannerAction::Search {
.... 2381                 query: branch.clone(),
.... 2382                 intent: Some("queued planner branch".to_string()),
.... 2383             },
.... 2384             rationale: "continue with the oldest queued branch".to_string(),
.... 2385         };
.... 2386     }
.... 2387 
.... 2388     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() && request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
.... 2389         return RecursivePlannerDecision {
.... 2390             action: PlannerAction::Search {
.... 2391                 query: fallback_planner_query(&request.user_prompt),
.... 2392                 intent: Some("initial planner fallback".to_string()),
.... 2393             },
.... 2394             rationale: "start with a bounded workspace search when the planner reply is invalid"
.... 2395                 .to_string(),
.... 2396         };
.... 2397     }
.... 2398 
.... 2399     RecursivePlannerDecision {
.... 2400         action: PlannerAction::Stop {
.... 2401             reason: "planner fallback stop".to_string(),
.... 2402         },
.... 2403         rationale: "stop after invalid planner replies once some loop state already exists"
.... 2404             .to_string(),
.... 2405     }
.... 2406 }
.... 2407 
.... 2408 fn fallback_planner_query(user_prompt: &str) -> String {
.... 2409     let query = user_prompt.trim();
.... 2410     if query.is_empty() {
.... 2411         "workspace context".to_string()
.... 2412     } else {
.... 2413         query.to_string()
.... 2414     }
.... 2415 }
